plot: A music teacher defies a strict principal to help students find love.
A woman loves one man but is forced to marry another in this love triangle.
Villagers challenge British officers to a cricket match to avoid paying taxes.
Three best friends navigate love and life after college.
A family drama about love, traditions and reunion of an estranged father and son.
A heartbroken man drowns himself in alcohol after his childhood love marries another.
A gangster pretends to be a doctor to fulfil his parents' dreams at a medical college.
A terminally ill man helps his neighbour find love before he passes away.
A mentally challenged young man befriends an alien who gives him extraordinary powers.
A cop teams up with an informant to catch a daring gang of bike thieves.
An Indian pilot and a Pakistani girl fall in love, separated by borders and prison.
A cartoonist and a free-spirited woman keep bumping into each other over the years.
An NRI NASA scientist returns to India and is moved by harsh rural realities.
Two Indians living in Australia fall in love and face the challenges of an unexpected pregnancy.
Two small-town dreamers team up to become India's most wanted con artists.
A blind girl falls in love with a charming tourist guide who turns out to be a terrorist.
A gangster begins seeing the spirit of Mahatma Gandhi who guides him on right and wrong.
A boy raised in isolation discovers he has superpowers and becomes a superhero.
Five restless youths portray freedom fighters and gradually awaken to their civic responsibility.
A master thief causes mayhem across continents while a cop hunts him down.
Two married people find their soulmates in each other in New York.
A junior artist reincarnates to seek revenge for the murder of his love in a past life.
A disgraced hockey player coaches the Indian women's hockey team to World Cup glory.
A heartbroken businessman's life is turned upside down by an unstoppably cheerful girl.
A dyslexic child finds a compassionate teacher who transforms his world.
A timid man disguises himself to win the heart of his own wife.
A political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput princess Jodhaa blossoms into love.
A businessman with short-term memory loss hunts the killers of his girlfriend.
Two men pretend to be a gay couple to share an apartment with a beautiful woman.
Three engineering students challenge the rat race and discover the true meaning of excellence.
A modern twist on Devdas where a self-destructive man spirals downward after lost love.
A spoilt rich boy finds purpose and identity after being cut off by his father.
Twin brothers with opposite personalities get entangled in Mumbai's criminal underworld.
A fearless, corrupt police officer takes on a powerful politician-gangster in UP.
A Muslim man with Asperger syndrome sets out across America to meet the US President.
Two wedding planners turn business partners but soon fall in love with each other.
Three friends embark on a road trip across Spain confronting their deepest fears.
A small-town musician's heartbreak transforms him into a rock legend but costs him everything.
A video game villain escapes into the real world and the hero must stop him.
The rise and fall of a bold actress who became a sensation in the South Indian film industry.
A pregnant woman arrives in Kolkata searching for her missing husband but uncovers a deadly conspiracy.
A deaf-mute man charms everyone around him and finds love in an unexpected place.
A blood feud between criminal families in a coal mining town spans three decades.
Three students at an elite school compete for friendship, love and annual trophies.
A free-spirited traveller and a bookworm reconnect years after a Himalayan trek.
A man on a trip to immerse his grandfather's ashes gets tangled up with Tamil gangsters.
The inspiring true story of legendary Indian sprinter Milkha Singh's journey from tragedy to triumph.
Two young lovers from rival feuding communities in Gujarat defy their families for love.
Three friends open a cricket academy and their bond is tested by communal violence.
A vengeful circus performer becomes a daring bank robber in Chicago facing an elite cop.
A Punjabi boy and a Tamilian girl fall in love at IIM and must convince their families.
A girl kidnapped just before her wedding discovers unexpected freedom on the road.
A small-town girl goes on her honeymoon alone after her fiance calls off the wedding.
An alien stranded on Earth questions religious superstitions while looking for his remote.
A Hamlet-inspired story of a young man seeking the truth about his missing father in Kashmir.
A devoted man goes on a mission to return a mute Pakistani girl back to her family.
The epic love story of Maratha warrior Bajirao and his second wife Mastani.
A dysfunctional wealthy family on a cruise holiday confronts their deep-rooted secrets.
A wrestling champion makes a comeback to donate blood for his dying son.
A former wrestler trains his daughters to become world-class wrestlers against all odds.
A one-sided love story about a musician who falls desperately in love with his best friend.
Multiple lives are affected by the rampant drug abuse epidemic in rural Punjab.
An ambitious bootlegger builds a criminal empire but is relentlessly pursued by a cop.
A small-town boy pursues a fiercely independent girl determined to fly abroad.
A man fights the system to build a toilet for his bride who refuses to live without one.
An Indian spy and a Pakistani agent join forces to rescue nurses held hostage by terrorists.
A Rajput queen threatens mass self-immolation to protect her honour from a tyrannical sultan.
A young Indian girl is married into a Pakistani military family as a spy before the 1971 war.
A biographical film on the turbulent life of Bollywood actor Sanjay Dutt.
A blind pianist accidentally witnesses a murder and gets entangled in a dangerous conspiracy.
A middle-class family is embarrassed when the parents announce a late-in-life pregnancy.
A boy from a lower caste falls madly in love with a girl from an influential family.
A young man from the slums of Dharavi discovers his passion for street rap music.
A talented surgeon spirals into self-destruction after his college sweetheart is forced to marry another.
21 Sikh soldiers of the British Indian Army fought 10,000 Afghan warriors at Saragarhi.
An Indian soldier is assigned to eliminate his former mentor who has gone rogue.
A father relives his college days with old friends to save his son's life after a fall.
Mathematician Anand Kumar coaches 30 underprivileged students for the IIT entrance exam.
Maratha warrior Tanhaji Malusare recaptures the Kondhana fort from the Mughal commander.
The story of Captain Vikram Batra who fought and died heroically in the Kargil War.
A girl forced into an arranged marriage falls for the man she is tied to and a magician.
An anti-terrorism squad chief races to stop a devastating terror attack on Mumbai.
Revolutionary Sardar Udham Singh avenges the Jallianwala Bagh massacre by assassinating a British official.
A young girl sold into prostitution rises to become a powerful underworld figure in Mumbai.
A young DJ discovers he has a magical connection with fire and is the chosen one of an ancient world.
Rocky takes control of the Kolar Gold Fields and faces threats from multiple powerful enemies.
An exiled spy returns to India to stop a massive terror attack planned by a former operative.
A prison warden orchestrates a series of heists to expose corrupt government officials.
Friends from Punjab attempt to reach England through illegal immigration across treacherous routes.
A son's obsessive devotion to his father descends into shocking violence and bloodshed.

movie: Rocky Aur Rani Kii Prem Kahaani
plot: A flamboyant Punjabi boy and a sophisticated Bengali journalist fall in love despite cultural differences.
A professional couple hired to help others break up discovers they have feelings for each other.
Tiger must clear his name after being framed by a Pakistani spy who was once his friend.
The town of Chanderi faces a new supernatural threat as the legendary Stree returns with a twist.
Elite Indian Air Force pilots go on a dangerous mission after a terrorist attack on their own.
A chance encounter on Christmas Eve between two lonely strangers spirals into a thrilling mystery.
Supercop Singham leads a team of officers on a mission to rescue his wife from a kidnapper.
In a dystopian future a bounty hunter discovers he is the tenth avatar of Vishnu sent to protect the world.
Two mismatched army officers must join forces to stop a quantum weapon from destroying India.
